assertions.text: Warns about large number of changed files
assertions.evidence: Overview table assigns risk levels to 25+ files; summary explicitly calls out 'With 25+ files changed' as key risk

assertions.text: Runs backend and frontend quality gates
assertions.evidence: Phase 2 runs make lint + make test (backend); Phase 4 runs npm run build + npm run lint (frontend). Sequential not parallel.

assertions.text: Performs environment variable diff before deploying
assertions.evidence: Step 1.2 checks .env.example diff; Step 6.6 mentions checking Vercel env vars before deploy
No pre-deploy performance baselines captured. Goes directly from quality gates to branching to deployment.

assertions.text: Uses canary deployment strategy for Cloud Run
assertions.evidence: Step 6.5 runs 'make deploy' which deploys with 100% traffic immediately. No canary strategy.
No baselines were captured, so no comparison possible. Post-deploy monitoring checks logs only.

assertions.text: Has rollback strategy if deployment fails
assertions.evidence: Dedicated 'Rollback Plan' section with Cloud Run revision rollback, Vercel rollback, and database rollback commands
